Table of Contents

Enum esriCurveIteratorEnum

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Identifies different stop options for an IEnumCurve iterator.

[Guid("39BF0140-DDAF-11D2-9F27-00C04F6BC8E8")]
public enum esriCurveIteratorEnum

Fields

esriCurveIteratorNoStop = 0

0: GetAtDistance will not stop at any endpoints of parts.

esriCurveIteratorStopAtCurveEnd = 4

4: GetAtDistance stopped at the end of the curve (only used for output).

esriCurveIteratorStopAtPartEndPoints = 3

3: GetAtDistance will stop at 'from' and 'to' points of parts.

esriCurveIteratorStopAtPartFrom = 1

1: GetAtDistance will stop at 'from' points of parts.

esriCurveIteratorStopAtPartTo = 2

2: GetAtDistance will stop at 'to' points of parts.
